LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT LIDYA KASHEVAROFF'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED THAT DEFENDANT WAS A FIDUCIARY TO PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT UNDER C.C.P SECTION 339, A TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. TWENTY DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT TO TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES DEFENDANT'S DUTY TO DISCLOSE AND NO AUTHORITY HAS BEEN CITED TO SUPPORT THE ASSERTION THAT PLAINTIFF HAD A DUTY TO INVESTIGATE. THE QUASI CONTRACT CLAIM BASED ON FRAUD IS GOVERNED BY C.C.P. SECTION 338 AND IS FOR THREE YEARS. MS. LIU TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KASHEVAROFF, LIDYA (ERRONEOUSLY SUED AS LYDIA KASHEVAROFF)
ORDER SUSTAINING IN PART AND OVERRULING IN PART DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT LIDYA KASHEVAROFF'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT WITH MORE PARTICULARITY TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF BAKER V. BEACH AIRCRAFT CORP. 39 CAL. APP.3RD 315, 321, IN PARTICULAR THE 3RD ELEMENT. AS TO CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT HAVING A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF OR PLEAD ACTUAL FRAUD BASED UPON CONCEALMENT WHERE A DUTY TO DISCLOSE EXISTS. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-25-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LIDYA KASHEVAROFF'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: REBECCA LIU, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY (415.554.3870) APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JAY M. GOLDMAN, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF TODD EMANUEL, 650.368.2588) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT ALLEGED THAT DEFENDANT WAS A FIDUCIARY TO PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT UNDER C.C.P SECTION 339, A TWO YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. TWENTY DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT TO TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AS TO THE REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES DEFENDANT'S DUTY TO DISCLOSE AND NO AUTHORITY HAS BEEN CITED TO SUPPORT THE ASSERTION THAT PLAINTIFF HAD A DUTY TO INVESTIGATE. THE QUASI CONTRACT CLAIM BASED ON FRAUD IS GOVERNED BY C.C.P. SECTION 338 AND IS FOR THREE YEARS. MS. LIU TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Sustained
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT LIDYA KASHEVAROFF'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FRAUDULENT CONCEALMENT WITH MORE PARTICULARITY TO MEET THE REQUIREMENTS OF BAKER V. BEACH AIRCRAFT CORP. 39 CAL. APP.3RD 315, 321, IN PARTICULAR THE 3RD ELEMENT.
AS TO CONSTRUCTIVE FRAUD, PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE THE BASIS FOR DEFENDANT HAVING A FIDUCIARY RELATIONSHIP WITH PLAINTIFF OR PLEAD ACTUAL FRAUD BASED UPON CONCEALMENT WHERE A DUTY TO DISCLOSE EXISTS. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
